The '''Kether system''' was located in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] and contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dargulli/Legends|Dargulli]].

==Appearances==
*[[Empire 1|''Empire'' 1]] {{1stm}}
*[[Empire 3|''Empire'' 3]]
*[[Empire 4|''Empire'' 4]]
